title: Elbaf’s History Darkens
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #8, Usopp, Unknown person #9 as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't there a huge line out there!! How'd you get in here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: THERE WAS A LINE? I HARDLY NOTICED!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't stand those guys... they're so noisy

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told him to come, but he said he wasn't feeling well, so he's napping on the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kyaah!:) Is that you, Roger? I've wanted to see you again so badly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now let me on your ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you no! I'm not into lovely-dovey women who throw themselves at me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But if shaky asked it'd be different.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yo, isn't newgate still here?! I wanna drink with him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Damn it, Rayleigh... Why didn't you come?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i wanna take care of her! Lemme help!!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Move it, boys!! Keep away from her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Coming to the island to visit her establishment would be granted safe passage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: would keep the peace if they crossed paths.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But back at sea, all bets were off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald. The government's really got ya wrapped around their finger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And in the end, ya just bowed down to them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this really somethin' worth Killin' your friend over?!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
